concept_decisions.labels_compared: measurement_error_models vs self-report/biomarker validation records inside surveillance_measurement_designs
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All titles and complete available abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-003_RECORDS.csv plus concept metadata in CONCEPT-BATCH-003.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: This cluster is substantively coherent around explicit modeling, validation, or correction of error-prone measurements, including causal-effect correction, assay calibration, latent-class etiology estimation, and misclassification-adjusted prevalence. The needed change is scope clarification, not a split of the retained branch.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Under-ascertainment, reporting completeness, and burden estimation
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Zero assigned records in CONCEPT-BATCH-003.csv and all titles/abstracts in CONCEPT-BATCH-003_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The batch contains no directly assigned records for this label. Conceptually, multiple-system estimation is one identification strategy for hidden-case burden and belongs inside the broader under-ascertainment/burden-estimation branch rather than as a standalone covered concept in this batch.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All five assigned titles and complete available abstracts
concept_decisions.rationale: These records jointly model a latent incidence or event process and an imperfect observation layer such as testing, notification, or visit scheduling. That identification structure is distinct from pure nowcasting and from generic underreporting multipliers.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Under-ascertainment, reporting completeness, and burden estimation
concept_decisions.labels_compared: surveillance_measurement_designs vs measurement_error_models vs sentinel_surveillance_calibration vs reporting_delay_nowcasting
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 1014 assigned titles and complete available abstracts
concept_decisions.rationale: The provisional label is an impermissible residual bucket. A large coherent retained branch estimates hidden incidence, prevalence, or burden from incomplete surveillance, registry, cohort, or serologic data, but many records instead evaluate surveillance-system data quality or validate self-reported exposures against biomarkers/records. Those distinct estimands and assumptions require separate concepts.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All three assigned titles and complete available abstracts
concept_decisions.rationale: All assigned records share the same core identification issue: samples are collected at times or places dependent on the latent process being inferred. The concept is stable and only needs a name that reflects both static and adaptive preferential sampling.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: reporting_delay_nowcasting vs auxiliary-signal nowcasting vs reproduction-number nowcasting vs surveillance system evaluation
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 76 assigned titles and complete available abstracts
concept_decisions.rationale: A coherent retained branch corrects delayed or incomplete reporting to estimate current case counts or hospitalizations. Separate records instead infer transmission intensity such as R(t), or use search, wastewater, virologic, or other leading indicators whose identification assumptions differ from reporting-delay correction.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Sentinel-surveillance system design, calibration, and population inference
concept_decisions.labels_compared: sentinel_surveillance_calibration vs sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness studies
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 328 assigned titles and complete available abstracts
concept_decisions.rationale: One large branch concerns sentinel platform construction, evaluation, representativeness, and extrapolation from sentinel data to wider incidence or prevalence. A second distinct branch uses sentinel enrollment as the sampling frame for test-negative or related vaccine-effectiveness estimands, which should not remain folded into calibration.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: syndromic_surveillance vs surveillance system evaluation and burden estimation
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All eight assigned titles and complete available abstracts
concept_decisions.rationale: The true core concept is symptom-triggered or syndrome-coded surveillance for early detection or monitoring. At least two assigned records are not syndromic methods at all and instead belong to broader surveillance review or burden-estimation branches.

reassignments.rationale: Compares reported drug use with urinalysis, targeting individual-level response misclassification rather than surveillance-system completeness.
Uses biomarkers to estimate under-reported alcohol use, an exposure-validation design rather than hidden-case burden estimation.
Studies determinants of interview underreporting of alcohol consumption at the respondent level.
Validates parent-reported vaccination status against more reliable records.
Compares underreporting of substance use across symptom domains, which is respondent misclassification.
Analyzes discordance between self-reported sexual behavior and incident STI outcomes.
Directly compares self-reported alcohol use with phosphatidylethanol measurement.
Focuses on misreporting of sexual behavior over time.
Method paper on estimating underreporting of self-reported risk behaviors.
Addresses social desirability bias in self-reports of substance use and HIV risk behavior.
Uses PEth to identify denied alcohol consumption, a biomarker validation design.
Compares PEth biomarker results with self-reported alcohol use.
Validates self-reported antiretroviral use against external evidence.
Compares objective adherence measures with self-reported adherence.
Models inaccuracy of parental reports of HPV vaccination status.
Compares parental recall with electronic health records.
Systematic review of under-reporting of known HIV-positive status, centered on respondent misclassification.
Compares survey and clinic records to estimate over- and under-reporting of HIV testing, status, and treatment.
Assesses concordance of biomarker, blood alcohol content, and self-report.
Compares self-reported condomless sex with biomarker evidence.
Compares registered and survey-based HIV transmission modes, a reporting-validity problem.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and data quality
reassignments.rationale: This is a design paper for sequential safety surveillance database configurations, not a paper about correcting error-prone measurements.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and data quality
reassignments.rationale: Evaluates timeliness and determinants of laboratory reporting delay rather than nowcasting current burden.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and data quality
reassignments.rationale: Measures changes in reporting timeliness after a law change; estimand is system performance, not nowcasted incidence.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and data quality
reassignments.rationale: Evaluates an mpox surveillance system and readiness for predictive modeling rather than performing nowcasting.
Uses Google searches as contemporaneous proxy information rather than delay correction.
Search-query nowcasting relies on external leading indicators, not reporting-lag adjustment.
Subregional influenza nowcasts are built from search trends.
Uses Baidu index signals rather than delayed case reporting.
Internet-based and network covariates are the identifying signals.
Hospitalization nowcasts are driven by Google Search Trends.
STI nowcasting is based on Google Trends signals.
Combines leading indicators with fatality nowcasting rather than only correcting report delays.
Wastewater signals are used as external predictors of current dynamics.
Evaluates wastewater predictive power for nowcasting transmission.
Graph-neural-nowcasting of ILI uses external spatial-temporal feature fusion.
Integrates wastewater dynamics with epidemic spread for near-real-time inference.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Nowcasting of reproduction numbers and transmission intensity
reassignments.rationale: Primary estimand is the effective reproduction number, not current case counts.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Nowcasting of reproduction numbers and transmission intensity
reassignments.rationale: Directly models instantaneous reproduction numbers at fine spatial scales.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Nowcasting of reproduction numbers and transmission intensity
reassignments.rationale: Generative Bayesian model nowcasts the effective reproduction number from line-list data.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Nowcasting of reproduction numbers and transmission intensity
reassignments.rationale: Focuses on time-varying reproduction-number nowcasting.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Nowcasting of reproduction numbers and transmission intensity
reassignments.rationale: Situational awareness is achieved through nowcasting of the reproduction number.
Case-control vaccine-effectiveness study conducted within a sentinel platform; estimand is causal VE, not calibration.
Sentinel surveillance provides the enrollment frame for VE estimation.
Estimates influenza vaccine effectiveness from sentinel surveillance data.
Multicentre sentinel test-negative VE study.
Sentinel platform explicitly built to estimate influenza vaccine effectiveness.
Interim VE estimate from a sentinel surveillance network.
I-MOVE sentinel study estimates seasonal influenza VE.
Interim VE estimation using a sentinel network.
Methodological evaluation of estimating influenza VE from passive surveillance data.
VE estimation from sentinel surveillance data is the core design.
Point-of-care testing is used to estimate VE in a sentinel surveillance network.
Explicit test-negative study nested in SARI sentinel surveillance.
Primary objective is VE against SARS-CoV-2-associated hospitalization in a sentinel platform.
Sentinel primary care and hospital platforms are used for influenza VE estimation.
Multicentre test-negative case-control RSV VE study.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and data quality
reassignments.rationale: Systematic review of dengue surveillance tools and enhancement strategies; not itself a symptom-based syndromic method paper.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Under-ascertainment, reporting completeness, and burden estimation
reassignments.rationale: Uses official report data to summarize burden and forecast outbreaks; syndromic surveillance appears only as a recommendation, not as the studied method.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and data quality
new_concepts.rationale: Needed for records whose estimand is completeness, timeliness, representativeness, reporting behavior, or data-source validity rather than hidden burden or causal effect.
Needed for records validating self-reported exposures, behaviors, vaccination status, or treatment against biomarkers or records; this is distinct from surveillance-system under-ascertainment.
Needed for nowcasting that identifies current burden from search, wastewater, virologic, or other external leading indicators rather than from reporting-delay correction alone.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Nowcasting of reproduction numbers and transmission intensity
new_concepts.rationale: Needed for papers whose target estimand is R(t) or related transmission intensity, not current case counts.
Needed because causal VE estimation in sentinel enrollment frames uses a different design and identifying assumptions than sentinel-system calibration or population inference.

concerns: Exact record-level reassignment is incomplete for the dense surveillance_measurement_designs and sentinel_surveillance_calibration branches; only high-confidence reassignments are listed here.
The batch contains zero assigned records for multiple_system_estimation, so the merge judgment is conceptual rather than based on direct within-label coverage.
Several accepted records appear only tangentially connected to surveillance measurement and would need a separate inclusion-validity audit outside this bounded semantic reading step.
